description: Watch a Snowflake PIPE for new file-level loads (COPY_HISTORY) and trigger downstream Dagster runs per ingested file.

job_name.description: Dagster job to trigger on each new pipe ingestion.

destination_table.description: Destination table the pipe is configured to COPY INTO. Required because COPY_HISTORY is queried per-table, not per-pipe.

user.description: Snowflake user (NAME for keypair; LOGIN_NAME for password/SSO/PAT).

database.description: Database containing the pipe + destination table.

schema.description: Schema containing the pipe + destination table.

password.description: Snowflake password. Leave unset for SSO/keypair/PAT.

minimum_interval_seconds.description: Seconds between polls. COPY_HISTORY has ~minute-level latency.

lookback_minutes.description: How far back to query COPY_HISTORY on each tick. The sensor cursor (the LAST_LOAD_TIME of the most recent processed file) prevents re-firing for the same file; lookback just bounds the query window.

pass_file_metadata.description: Include file_name + file_size + row_count in the run_config passed to the triggered job. Disable if you have many RunRequests per tick and want to keep the config small.
